title: Better Attack Sweep
body:
## ![banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a47bedfffa7474efb58a3d6599f02c635d429e0d.png)

**Resource pack reworks the default sword swing effect in Minecraft. Instead of a simple white stripe, the hit animation looks like a real cut, with a split forming in the center as the swing appears. The effect feels cleaner, sharper, and more impactful while staying true to vanilla combat**
Animation ![Sweep](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/77ee384cd6977835b6b2b67b2a2d7c6f7240787e.gif)
[![SparkedHost](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/1460304641236668511/1461763448441405532/Artboard_3.png?ex=696bbccc&is=696a6b4c&hm=e337c59f0d19fe2de554a07f4c371d8f6c815247c4ca690bb132b334efe231e9&)](https://billing.sparkedhost.com/aff.php?aff=3089)
